title: Breynia po-khantii
intro:
I apologise, but I could not find any information on a plant called "Breynia po-khantii". However, I can provide information on the plant "Breynia disticha", also known as "Nine-bark" or "Snow Bush".

Breynia disticha is a flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, characterized by its distinctive white or pinkish flowers and its ability to change color with temperature, causing its leaves to turn white in cold temperatures.

Breynia disticha has been traditionally used in medicine, and its health benefits include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties.

The bioactive constituents of Breynia disticha include flavonoids, saponins, and triterpenoids, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal properties.

Breynia disticha is often used to make herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
